label: Text Columns
description: A multi-column text layout block for splitting content into 2-4 parallel columns. Each column has its own heading and rich text body. Use for comparing features side-by-side, service descriptions, or breaking up dense content. Layout: equal-width responsive grid stacking to single column on mobile.

columns.title: Expert Team
columns.content: Our team brings decades of combined experience in software engineering, design, and product strategy to every project we undertake.

columns.title: Proven Results
columns.content: We have delivered over 200 successful projects for clients ranging from early-stage startups to Fortune 500 enterprises across multiple industries.

columns.title: Ongoing Support
columns.content: Our relationship does not end at launch. We provide dedicated support, monitoring, and continuous improvement to keep your product thriving.
